archetype_reasoning: Originally profiled 2026-06-10. The three new resolved trades (Jun 16-17) are all entries on 'Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of June?' at YES @ 0.180 — all LOST. While 0.180 is technically a contested price, the evidence is three orders on the same market in a 24-hour window, consistent with position scaling (splitting one bet into three orders) rather than three independent forecasting acts. This does NOT represent a genuine YIELD_HARVESTER waking up to make directional forecasts across diverse markets. The full resolved history still shows the core pattern: near-certainty yield collection with occasional directional speculation that loses. Archetype remains YIELD_HARVESTER — reclassification requires 30+ new resolved trades across 5+ distinct markets contradicting the archetype (not met: 3 new trades, 1 market).
